name: HANGAR 8
short_description: HANGAR 8 is a psychological horror set within the unsettling confines of a derelict space station. Brave the looping corridors to get to level 8, discover all anomalies, collect key items, and escape the nightmare!
detailed_description:
You wake up gasping for air, but your lungs burn as you cough up PFC fluid. Disoriented and alone, you find yourself trapped aboard a derelict space station. But you're not truly alone—anomalous activity has consumed the station! Your only chance for survival lies in getting to HANGAR 8 and escaping this looping nightmare before it’s too late!

What is HANGAR 8 about, what do you do?

HANGAR 8 is a sci-fi walking simulator crossed with a spooky spot-the-difference game inspired by The Exit 8. Be on the look out for anomalies between levels 1 to 8, while using level 0 as a reference. Anomalies could be anything from something being not quite right in the environment, to deadly monsters and otherworldly entities. If you find an anomaly, turn back—otherwise you just need to keep moving forward! HANGAR 8 is all about creating a tense psychological horror atmosphere and getting you to question your sanity while collecting key items and reading lost crew logbooks in order to escape the looping nightmare!

What can I expect from HANGAR 8?

  • A complete science-fiction psychological horror experience! HANGAR 8 is a complete game solo-developed with passion, that has a beginning, middle, and a single ending. While there is only one ending, there are slight differences with each playthrough, as you discover all anomalies. Any possible future updates will be FREE!

  • 58 Anomalies To Discover, offering replay-ability for multiple escape attempts! If you spot an anomaly, it will never repeat until all fifty anomalies are found. (There is a extra mode to enable all anomalies for a greater challenge!)

  • Collect the 6 key items required to escape, while finding 6 optional logbooks hidden throughout the space station to read for game lore!

  • Interactive Objects will immerse you in this spooky spot-the-difference puzzle game. Explore the environment in order to figure out how to escape the cursed space station! You will need to look inside crates, or even turn on showers in order to verify that levels are clear of anomalies.

  • 30 to 120+ minutes for a single play-through, depending on your perceptive skills and how lucky you get with the random anomaly selection algorithm. (Auto-save feature for if you want to take a break and continue later!)

  • 8 Achievements to gain, one of which will test your speed running skills! HANGAR 8 has a built-in timer and an official leaderboard on for those who want to challenge me (the dev) and optimise their escape times!

First Game By Solo Developer :3

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian, Hindi
